song.title: Look and Live
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) Look to Jesus, weary one, Look and live! look and live! Look at what the Lord has done, Look and live!|| See Him lifted on the tree, Look and live! look and live! Hear Him say, “Look unto Me!” Look and live!
[C] Chorus Look! the Lord is lifted high, Look to Him, He’s ever nigh; Look and live! why will you die? Look and live!
[V2] 2) Though unworthy, vile, unclean, Look and live! look and live! Look away from self and sin, Look and live!|| Long by Satan’s pow’r enslaved, Look and live! look and live! Look to Me, you shall be saved, Look and live!
[V3] 3) Though you’ve wandered far away, Look and live! look and live! Harden not your heart today, Look and live!|| ’Tis your Father calls you home, Look and live! look and live! Whosoever will may come, Look and live!
song.author: Philip P. Bliss
